title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work at our company?
A: Employees may be eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements based on their role, performance, and team needs. To qualify, employees should demonstrate a strong track record of productivity and effective communication. Managers will assess requests on a case-by-case basis, considering the nature of the work and team dynamics. Expectations for remote or hybrid work include maintaining regular communication with team members, meeting deadlines, and being available during core business hours. Employees are also responsible for ensuring they have a suitable workspace and reliable internet connection. All remote work arrangements must be documented and approved by management.
